limitations: Keyword filter is lexical on objeto_contrato — not technical object equivalence.
valor_sum is global contracted value (valor_total), not unit price or margin.
Absence of SC contracts in this filter is not proof of non-operation in SC.
No partnership/consortium is inferred from co-presence.
National inventory completeness depends on upstream crawl windows — not assumed complete.

claim_class_legend.fact: Directly observed from contract rows (counts, UF set, sums).
claim_class_legend.indicator: Derived statistic (percentiles, shares, modes); not a legal finding.
claim_class_legend.hypothesis: Business inference requiring human validation; not proven relationship.

entrant_signal.label: potential_sc_entrant
entrant_signal.reason: Active outside SC on keyword filter; no SC contracts in filter window
